notes: Adds the in-plugin check updates button and plugin-safe update prompt.
Carey complete mode on the remote backend now supports ACE-Step v1.5 XL models, with xl-turbo as the default and xl-base available in Advanced.
xl-turbo is fixed at 8 steps / CFG 1.0; xl-base keeps editable steps / CFG for slower higher-control runs.
Close your DAW before replacing plugin files with a downloaded update.
